Baker: "Where do you think you're going with that bread? You have to pay for that!"
Woman: "Please sir, me and my children, we are starving. I can't afford anything, my husband died fighting for this kingdom."

Woman: "Please, i am willing to do anything, just let me get this bread to my children"

Witch: "So this is how you treat your subjects? This widow is starving and desperate. My sweet regent, aren't you going to intervene?"

Regent: "I overheared your commotion and decided to check it out"
Woman: "My regent... there's no reason for you to intervene with such a small issue. The baker and I have this sorted.?"
Don't Worry I understand

Regent: "Don't worry, i understand. Here is some money so that you can pay this kind baker over here. It should be enough to get you back up your feet and find a job so that you can support your kids"
Woman: "My regent. i can't-"
Regent: "You can, and you will. You are my subject and are a widow because of my wars. I am sorry for what happened to your husband, take this money, its the least i could do. "
Woman: "My regent, thank you, thank you so much"
Silence
Regent: "Silence, I saw what happened, if you really were starving you would be spending your time finding a job instead of stealing from others"
